results.title: Robotic brachytherapy of the prostate.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 20201771. 2009/01/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: Consolidation brachytherapy is a critical treatment component for 
cervical cancer patients undergoing primary chemoradiation. Some patients are 
unsuitable for brachytherapy for a variety of reasons. The use of alternatives 
(LINAC-based stereotactic radiosurgery or external beam boosts) compromise 
oncologic results in cervical cancer patients. Thus, we evaluated the value of 
brachytherapy-like doses prescriptions using robotic radiosurgery (
